author: dimagious
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Snipsy adds hotstrings/text expansion to the editor — folders, bulk editing, and Espanso-compatible packs.

manifest.author: Dimagious
manifest.description: Hotstrings and snippet management for the editor with folders, bulk editing, and Espanso-compatible packs.
manifest.name: Snipsy

name: Snipsy

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix(ui): group accordion expands on full-header click, not just chevron (B-124) by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/53


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/compare/1.1.7...1.1.8

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix(a11y): close B-003 umbrella tail — WCAG-relevant polish (1.1.7 PR 1) by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/41
* refactor(services): community-packages.ts split + parallel fetch (1.1.7 PR 2, B-025 + B-024) by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/42
* refactor(snippets): extract add/edit plans to core/snippet-ops (1.1.7 PR 3, B-028 second half) by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/43
* perf(engine): cap findTrigger lookback at 64 chars (1.1.7 PR 4, B-019) by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/44
* fix(ux): three small polish items (1.1.7 PR 5, B-053 + B-044 + B-056/059/060) by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/45
* fix(ui): polish bundle (1.1.7 PR 6, B-051 + B-052 + B-058 + B-061) by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/46
* feat(espanso): import into a named group instead of root namespace (1.1.7 PR 7, B-045) by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/47
* chore(dx): cleanup bundle (1.1.7 PR 8, B-020 + B-023 + B-113) by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/48
* test(e2e): expansion + persistence boundary fills (1.1.7 PR 9, B-108/109/110/111) by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/49
* test(ui): un-exempt src/ui from coverage gate (B-114) by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/50
* fix(community): preserve cache on live-load failure; honest Notice (B-118) by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/51
* chore(scorecard): close 1.1.6 -94→91% regression + add release gate (B-063) by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/52


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/compare/1.1.6...1.1.7

* refactor(install): lift install-plan to core/ (1.1.6 PR 2, B-028 partial) by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/38
* fix(install): redefine "installed" + add Reinstall/Uninstall (1.1.6 PR 3, B-017 P0 + B-042) by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/39
* fix(packages): PackagePreviewModal bulk-action buttons no longer duplicate the modal DOM by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/40

## What's Changed
* feat(styles): 1.1.0 CSS foundation — atomic migration to single scoped file (PR 4b) by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/21
* feat(ui): 1.1.0 tab strip — new IA, WAI-ARIA, keyboard nav (PR 4c) by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/22
* feat(ui): 1.1.0 SnippetsTab rewrite — toolbar + single-edit-mode (PR 4d) by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/23
* feat(ui): 1.1.0 BasicTab strip CTAs + ImportPreviewModal (PR 4e) by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/24
* feat(ui): 1.1.0 Packages + About rewrite, drop Google Forms (PR 4f) by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/25
* refactor(ui): align General tab visual style with About tab by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/26
* feat: 1.1.0 — UI redesign + drop Google Forms by @Dimagious in https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/pull/27

releases.author: Dimagious
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### Bug Fixes
- Fix all Obsidian plugin review issues from ObsidianReviewBot
- Remove unused eslint-disable directives
- Fix async functions without await expressions
- Fix template literal expressions with unknown types
- Remove promptNewGroup() that used browser prompt()
- Use type annotations instead of type assertions where possible
- Handle promises properly with void operator
- Work around hardcoded-config-path false positive for forum URL

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Dimagious/snipsidian/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2
